title: lotus villosus
intro: Lotus villosus is a flowering plant species, commonly known as the hairy lotus or hairy water lotus, belonging to the Nelumbo genus. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of lotus villosus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Lotus villosus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
